headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents compared

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, editorial comparison of Super and Grok for people evaluating personal AI agents. Grok is advancing quickly as a powerful assistant and agent platform. Super is purpose‑built for real computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer‑use cache that makes repeated work more efficient over time.
